title: calonyction tuboides
intro: Calonyction tuboides, also known as the 'Wedelia' or 'Girardinia', is a perennial plant belonging to the dandelion family, Asteraceae. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Calonyction tuboides include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and even serve as a natural antiseptic. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used to treat various ailments in folk medicine.
